rationale: Adding BSON type support to XS module to match pure-Perl; implementation improvement, no specific spec rule violated.
Documentation spelling fixes; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Checking error code vs string for missing namespace; internal implementation detail, no specific spec rule cited.
Explicitly a test ticket to be ignored; no content.
Test failure due to server-side error message change; CI/test maintenance, not a spec conformance issue.
Extended JSON decoding feature request; API ergonomics improvement, no specific spec rule violated.
minHeartbeatFrequencyMS bypassed by primary caching; SDAM spec requires honoring minHeartbeatFrequencyMS for periodic scanning.
Client-side OID generation uses wrong codec type; internal implementation bug, no specific spec rule about codec-specific OID generation.
Perl version compatibility bug in XS module; language runtime issue, no spec involvement.
User-reported $unset usage issue; resolved as works-as-designed, no spec violation.
BSON::XS build failure on Windows; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Auth spec explicitly requires 'authSource' URI parameter support; driver was missing this required feature.
Strawberry Perl builder update due to upstream format change; CI/build infrastructure, no spec involvement.
Flaky test for deprecated method on sharded cluster; test maintenance, not a spec conformance issue.
GridFS tests fail on Windows due to line-ending differences; platform CI issue, not a spec conformance bug.
BSON::Time serialization fails on 32-bit Perl due to Math::BigFloat vs Math::BigInt; platform compatibility bug, no spec rule violation.
Explicitly references Python's approach to preferring IPv4 for localhost; filed to align Perl with Python's behavior.
Summary states 'Drivers MUST NOT require a username in the URI for MONGODB-X509'; direct auth spec requirement violation.
CI testing for Atlas Free Tier proxy; test infrastructure/CI work, not a spec conformance issue.
Switching to binary SASL payloads for Atlas proxy compatibility; workaround for proxy limitation, no specific spec rule violated.

Build failure on ARM64/Power8 requiring -lpthreads; platform-specific build issue, no spec involvement.
Documentation fix for Cursor hint() method; doc correction, no behavior or spec change.
Documentation correction for GridFS filename uniqueness; doc fix, not a spec conformance issue.

Typo fixes in Tutorial.pod; documentation only, no spec involvement.
Typo fixes in README and GSSAPI section; documentation only, no spec involvement.
Caching SCRAM-SHA-1 ClientKey for performance; performance optimization, no spec rule violated.

Orchestrated devel tests broken due to server log output changes; CI/test maintenance, no spec conformance issue.

Short reads causing ProtocolError; internal network/IO implementation bug, no specific wire protocol spec rule violated.
Backport of PERL-769 short reads fix; same as parent, internal IO bug, no spec involvement.
Backport of PERL-831 Windows SASL threads bug; platform-specific issue, no spec involvement.
Adding 'comment' parameter to aggregate command; new feature addition from DRIVERS-377, not fixing wrong behavior.

URI spec requires username/password to be URI-escaped; driver failed to enforce this. Links to DRIVERS-391.

Unused dead code function causing GCC warning; internal code cleanup, no spec involvement.
Improving auth error message formatting; UX improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Wide character in username crashes SCRAM-SHA-1 auth; encoding implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Overloading comparison operators on BSON::Timestamp for convenience; API ergonomics, not a spec requirement.

Deprecating snapshot option per SPEC-1033/DRIVERS-454; proactive spec-rollout improvement, not fixing wrong existing behavior.

Spec change requiring decreased implicit session leak likelihood; references specific spec commit, fixing spec-mandated behavior.
topology_status with refresh fails to rescan during socket cooldown window; SDAM spec defines cooldown window behavior.
